themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "The confession "Yahweh, maker of heaven and earth" appears repeatedly throughout Scripture as...". Word-study detail reinforces "וָאָֽרֶץ׃: and earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".
